design_philosophy: Ultra-refined modern dark UI. Avoids typical 'Twitter blue' or generic AI-slop purple/teal. Employs asymmetric card layouts, glass-morphism overlays, and subtle grain textures. A 3-column architecture (Left Sticky Nav, Center Feed, Right Widgets). Focus on micro-interactions, custom aesthetics, and typographic tension.

surface.description: Primary card and feed background. 1px solid white/5 border to detach from background.

surface_glass.description: For sticky headers and overlays. Must be used with backdrop-blur-xl.

accent_primary.description: Neon Vermilion. Distinctive, energetic, high-contrast. Used for primary CTAs and active states.

text_secondary.description: Zinc-400 for handles, dates, and metadata.

border.description: Subtle zinc border for separating feed items.

layout_and_spacing.desktop: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-[280px_minmax(600px,1fr)_350px] max-w-[1300px] mx-auto gap-0 lg:gap-8
layout_and_spacing.card: p-5 border-b border-zinc-800 hover:bg-white/[0.02] transition-colors duration-200
layout_and_spacing.glass_header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#0A0A0A]/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-zinc-800 px-5 py-3

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-[#FF5722] text-white px-6 py-2.5 hover:bg-[#FF7A50] transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-95 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,87,34,0.2)]
buttons.secondary: rounded-none border border-zinc-700 bg-transparent text-white px-4 py-2 hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.icon: rounded-full p-2.5 text-zinc-400 hover:text-[#FF5722] hover:bg-[#FF5722]/10 transition-all

inputs.composer: w-full bg-transparent text-xl font-body text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 focus:outline-none resize-none overflow-hidden
inputs.search: w-full bg-zinc-900 rounded-full px-5 py-2.5 text-sm text-white placeholder:text-zinc-500 border border-transparent focus:border-[#FF5722]/50 focus:bg-black transition-all

textures_and_globals.grain: Use an SVG noise filter or a CSS repeating radial gradient over the main background at 2% opacity to add depth and avoid a flat look.
textures_and_globals.scrollbar: Custom scrollbars in CSS: ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #27272A; border-radius: 10px; }

animations.hover_like: scale up by 1.2, change color to #FF5722, add subtle drop-shadow
animations.card_entry: fade in, translate-y-4 to 0, ease-out duration 400ms
animations.modals: backdrop blur entry, scale 0.95 to 1, fade in

specific_instructions_for_main_agent: Ensure the split-screen auth uses one of the abstract texture banners for the visual half.
Do not use generic Shadcn cards for posts; build custom HTML/Tailwind posts with asymmetric borders or distinct hover states.
Implement real-time features using state or context with clear UI feedback (loading spinners, optimistic updates).
Apply global styles for custom scrollbars and custom text selection as defined in textures_and_globals.
Make sure all icons are Phosphor Icons or Lucide, styled sharply to match Bricolage Grotesque.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all buttons, links, and forms as required for testing.
In the feed, use CSS grid or flexbox carefully. The central feed column should have 'border-x border-zinc-800'.
For the image upload base64 logic, use a hidden file input and a FileReader in standard React (.js files).
Use Bricolage Grotesque for headings, Geist for body, and JetBrains Mono for metadata (dates/handles).
Strictly follow PT-BR translations for the entire UI.
No AI functionalities in this project as per requirements.
